name: An Old FTC Game Element (6-sided)
description: You’ve spotted the two Pixels from the FTC Centerstage season. In the wild, these hexagonal plastic scoring elements were meant to be stacked in beautiful mosaics; in this lab, they’ve been demoted to 'very expensive coasters' or 'low-profile shims' to level out a wobbly laptop stand. It's a nostalgic reminder that a few-years-ago's 'critical mission objective' is this year's desk clutter.
